case_title: CASSANDRA CLARA NGAN VS. KEVIN STEPHENS DESIGN GROUP, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGAN, CASSANDRA CLARA AS TO DEFENDANT KEVIN STEPHENS DESIGN GROUP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGAN, CASSANDRA CLARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEVIN STEPHENS DESIGN GROUP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $10,026.67 PRINCIPAL, $66.64 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,463.31, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
